{{Infobox character
| name = Nasharia
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Nasharia]] is a princess of [[Karosha]] and the daughter of [[Queen Shyrax]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Princess Nasharia]] is present in the audience.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nasharia]] is Shyrax's daughter.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c6">''The Pilot'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Nasharia]] is [[Rellask]]'s sister.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
